title: Student Expression: Distribution of Nonschool Literature
description: Students and community members who want to hand out flyers, pamphlets, or other printed materials on school campuses need to follow specific guidelines set by the district. The policy explains where, when, and how nonschool literature can be distributed, and outlines any approval steps required before materials are shared with students. Understanding these rules helps families and outside groups participate in school life while keeping the learning environment safe and orderly.
